violations.text: The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Labels ordered during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of pink and black residues. Ice machine is to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of pink and black residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being emptied to be properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
